title: If covid never happened do people think they would have still made the original June 2020 release date
display_title: If covid never happened do people think they would have still made the original June 2020 release date
wikitext:
[]: If covid never happened do people think they would have still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Fri Feb 12, 2021 5:47 pm Curious to know if people think they would of actually finished it on time if covid didn’t happen as it was another 6 months after June 2020 until it was actually completed

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Feb 12, 2021 6:18 pm Yes, end of thread.

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by Mr. M » Fri Feb 12, 2021 6:20 pm Yes.

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Feb 12, 2021 6:25 pm It would have been releasable; and like all the preceding films work would have continued to tweak it further. As is likely happening even now!

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Fri Feb 12, 2021 7:10 pm Probably yes. Unless any unforeseen event occurred, and it was necessary to delay it for a few more weeks. It seems that the "ghost of frustration" still haunts this forum, sadly.

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Feb 12, 2021 7:24 pm Yes. They announced the release date a full six months out. Which means they likely had the day chosen internally another six months to a year before that. If a once-every-hundred-years awful pandemic hadn't come along and caused chaos all over the world the film would have 100% been ready and in theaters on June 27, 2020.

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by ArtyumR » Sat Feb 13, 2021 2:44 am NO. They didn't finish the movie at the time and everything was still in progress, for what we know this not the case anymore.

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by Line » Sat Feb 13, 2021 2:59 am Yes. I think so.

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Sat Feb 13, 2021 5:33 am ArtyumR wrote: NO. They didn't finish the movie at the time and everything was still in progress, for what we know this not the case anymore.

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Feb 13, 2021 10:34 am Yeah, you don't just go over the release date without a very good reason. Anno has taken eight years to make Shin, what makes you think he would set a rushed finish date he can't hold? The man is a perfectionist. The movie was ready (or almost ready and would have been if not for the lockdowns) to be released in June, all work after that was just extra polishing that would have otherwise gone into the home video release

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by Velorex » Sun Feb 14, 2021 7:53 am Thesufferingpumpkin wrote: Curious to know if people think they would of actually finished it on time if covid didn’t happen as it was another 6 months after June 2020 until it was actually completed

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Sun Feb 14, 2021 8:37 am Of course the film was not finished when they decided to delay it-it was however close enough to being finished that Khara could reasonably expect to meet the release date without problems.

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Feb 14, 2021 8:58 am Absolutely yes. Velorex wrote: NO I believe the film was not finished.

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by Fredsq » Sun Feb 14, 2021 10:53 am petition to correct `would of` to `would have` in topic title

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would have still made the original June 2020 release date?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Feb 14, 2021 11:21 am good point, change has been made

[]: Re: If covid never happened do people think they would of still made the original Jun
